Text.Page: Vandraul is recruiting members for an expedition to locate the legendary Floating Stone in Rift's Edge.

New recruits! Wonderful!

This is a daunting task, but you look to have the skill and experience to prevail!Ask if Floating Stones really exist in this place.

I have it on good authority that the Floating Stone is hidden deep within the caves here at the edge of the rift.

Getting there won't be easy. The ravine is full of huge monsters, and the Floating Stone itself is guarded by increasingly deadlier beasts.

But first, you'll need to pass through the Guwangi Village here. Take my advice: Kill the weaker monsters first! If you try to take out their leaders, the guwangi will overwhelm you.

Good luck!

That was most impressive! I wouldn't have believed it if I hadn't seen it myself.

You've done us an enormous service. The Floating Stone is our problem now; I've given the order to move it to the Arc.

You should rest up—and enjoy your victory!
